script: const getAudioPath=async(e,a,o,n)=>{let i=require("path"),l=require("fs"),t=new Date().getTime()+".wav";l.existsSync(i.join(o,"tts"))||l.mkdirSync(i.join(o,"tts"));let m=await getTTSAudio(e,a,n);return l.writeFileSync(i.join(o,"tts",t),m),i.join(o,"tts",t)},getTTSAudio=async(e,a,o)=>{let n=o.apiKey||"",i=o.voiceName||"tongtong",l=require("axios"),t={model:"glm-tts",input:e,voice:i,response_format:"wav",speed:a||1};return new Promise((e,a)=>{l.post("https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/audio/speech",t,{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${n}`,"Content-Type":"application/json"},responseType:"arraybuffer"}).then(a=>{console.log(a),e(Buffer.from(a.data))}).catch(e=>{console.log(e),a("")})})},getTTSVoice=async e=>{let a=[{name:"tongtong",gender:"female",locale:"zh-CN",displayName:"彤彤 tongtong (zh-CN) - Female"},{name:"chuichui",gender:"male",locale:"zh-CN",displayName:"锤锤 chuichui (zh-CN) - Male"},{name:"xiaochen",gender:"male",locale:"zh-CN",displayName:"小陈 xiaochen (zh-CN) - Male"},{name:"jam",gender:"male",locale:"zh-CN",displayName:"jam (zh-CN) - Male"},{name:"kazi",gender:"female",locale:"zh-CN",displayName:"kazi (zh-CN) - Female"},{name:"douji",gender:"male",locale:"zh-CN",displayName:"douji (zh-CN) - Male"},{name:"luodo",gender:"male",locale:"zh-CN",displayName:"luodo (zh-CN) - Male"},];return a.map(a=>({name:a.name,gender:a.gender,locale:a.locale,displayName:`Zhipu TTS - ${a.displayName}`,plugin:"zhipu-tts-voice-plugin",config:{...e,voiceName:a.name}}))};global.getAudioPath=getAudioPath,global.getTTSVoice=getTTSVoice;
